articles.excerpt: Joe Kent’s resignation is not an anomaly but an alarm: elite dissent is surfacing early because this war is built on deception. Joe Kent’s resignation is shocking, but not for the obvious reason. It is not shocking simply because it comes from within the Trum…

articles.title: Supreme Court orders probe into alleged medical negligence at Paropakar Maternity Hospital
articles.excerpt: KATHMANDU: The Supreme Court has issued an order in a case involving alleged medical negligence during a surgery performed nearly two decades ago at Paropakar Maternity and Women’s Hospital. A joint bench of Justices Nahakul Subedi and Sunil Kumar Pokharel fo…

articles.title: Jio tells bankers it may file IPO prospectus as early as March

articles.title: Breaking the Orbán deadlock

articles.title: India to mandate locally made solar ingots, wafers for clean energy projects from June 2028
articles.excerpt: India is set to boost its solar manufacturing. From June 2028, clean energy firms must use locally made solar ingots and wafers. This move aims to reduce reliance on Chinese imports. India is investing heavily in domestic solar production. The country is targ…
